item.title: A message from the Guidance Office:
item.description: Are you a grade 11 student? We have an opportunity to visit Algonquin College for a hands-on experience where you can explore a variety of programs including construction, technology, health, business, media, and more. This is a great opportunity to test out a program of interest to you and experience campus life. Visit the Guidance Teams page to fill out the Expression of Interest form, or see Ms Timmins or Mr Spence for more information.

item.title: A message from Mme Bourdon:
item.description: Just a reminder to all ski/snowboard participants that your arm band is due back as soon as possible. Please drop it off at Mme Bourdon's office during the day or during your lunch hour.

item.title: A message from Mr. Vonesch:
item.description: All high school students who have signed up to help read at the Holy Week prayer service this week, please come to the chapel at lunch to practice. Thank you

item.title: A message from Ms. Clouthier.
item.description: There will be a 7&8 boys basketball practice on Thursday until 3:30pm instead of 4:00.
